device_name: V8 Diagnostic Ultrasound System; cV8 Diagnostic Ultrasound System; V7 Diagnostic Ultrasound System; cV7 Diagnostic Ultrasound System; V6 Diagnostic Ultrasound System; cV6 Diagnostic Ultrasound System; V5 Diagnostic Ultrasound System; cV5 Diagnostic Ultrasound System; V4 Diagnostic Ultrasound System; cV4 Diagnostic Ultrasound System
intended_use: The diagnostic ultrasound system and probes are designed to obtain ultrasound images and analyze body fluids. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gynecology, Intra-operativ
intended_use_full: The diagnostic ultrasound system and probes are designed to obtain ultrasound images and analyze body fluids. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gynecology, Intra-operative, Pediatric, Small Organ, Neonatal Cephalic, Adult Cephalic, Trans-rectal, Trans-vaginal, Muscular-Skeletal (Conventional, Superficial), Urology, Cardiac Adult, Cardiac Pediatric, Thoracic, Trans-esophageal (Cardiac) and Peripheral vessel. It is intended for use by, or by the order of, and under the supervision of, an appropriately trained healthcare professional who is qualified for direct use of medical devices.
target_condition: Fetal abnormalities, cardiac abnormalities, general diagnostic ultrasound assessment
ground_truth: Expert manual annotation and measurement by three participating experts (obstetricians/sonographers with 10-25+ years experience) following clinical device protocols; reference standard established using target ultrasound device to reflect clinical use environment
other_metrics: BiometryAssist - average dice-score 0.869 (segmentation), circumference error rate ≤8%, distance error rate ≤4%, NT error rate ≤1mm (size measurement); ViewAssist - average dice-score 0.863 (segmentation); HeartAssist fetus - average dice-score 0.865 (segmentation), area error rate ≤8%, angle error rate ≤4%, circumference error rate ≤11%, diameter error rate ≤11%
